<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-ngū]][[de:Holz-Pferd]][[hak:Kap-ńg]][[ja:甲午]][[ko:갑오]][[nds:Holt-Peerd]][[vi:Giáp Ngọ]][[za:Gyapngux]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-ngó͘]][[zh-yue:甲午]][[zh:甲午]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-ngū]][[de:Holz-Pferd]][[hak:Kap-ńg]][[ja:甲午]][[ko:갑오]][[nds:Holt-Peerd]][[vi:Giáp Ngọ]][[za:Gyapngux]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-ngó͘]][[zh-yue:甲午]][[zh:甲午]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-ngū]][[de:Holz-Pferd]][[hak:Kap-ńg]][[ja:甲午]][[ko:갑오]][[nds:Holt-Peerd]][[vi:Giáp Ngọ]][[za:Gyapngux]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-ngó͘]][[zh-yue:甲午]][[zh:甲午]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Horse|kanji=甲午|romaji=kinoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=jiǎwǔ|w=chia-wu|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ u²¹|y=gaap6 ng5|j=gaap6 ng5|ci=kaːp̚ ŋo|mc=kæp ŋo|oc-bs=kaːp ŋaʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Horse also known as 甲午''' (kinoeuma, kōbokunouma, kougo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 31st combination of the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}} and the following combination is {{ill|Otsuji|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}’ {{ill|Horse|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|1=Horse (zodiac)|lt=Horse (午)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683439}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and they interact by {{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood produces Fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Wood Horse (甲午)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎwǔ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 ng5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-uma
***Onyomi 1: koubu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap o (갑오)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Ngọ

<!--
==
* Yang Wood Horse (甲午) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎwǔ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 ng5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: きのえうま (kinoe-uma)
***Onyomi: こうかのうま (kōka-no-uma)
***Onyomi: こうご (kōgo)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapo
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Ngọ

-->
==Years of Yang Wood Horse==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 34 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=Year|1=Year}} of Kōgo.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Kōgo'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 34|en|AD 34|WD=Q30238|lt=34 AD|1=AD 34}}
* {{ill|AD 94|en|AD 94|WD=Q33620|lt=94 AD|1=AD 94}}
* {{ill|154|en|154|WD=Q30385|lt=154 AD|1=154}}
* {{ill|214|en|214|WD=Q32938|lt=214 AD|1=214}}
* {{ill|274|en|274|WD=Q33512|lt=274 AD|1=274}}
* {{ill|334|en|334|WD=Q32105|lt=334 AD|1=334}}
* {{ill|394|en|394|WD=Q48126|lt=394 AD|1=394}}
* {{ill|454|en|454|WD=Q30794|lt=454 AD|1=454}}
* {{ill|514|en|514|WD=Q32881|lt=514 AD|1=514}}
* {{ill|574|en|574|WD=Q32597|lt=574 AD|1=574}}
* {{ill|634|en|634|WD=Q31056|lt=634 AD|1=634}}
* {{ill|694|en|694|WD=Q23483|lt=694 AD|1=694}}
* {{ill|754|en|754|WD=Q23646|lt=754 AD|1=754}}
* {{ill|814|en|814|WD=Q23447|lt=814 AD|1=814}}
* {{ill|874|en|874|WD=Q23843|lt=874 AD|1=874}}
* {{ill|934|en|934|WD=Q23803|lt=934 AD|1=934}}
* {{ill|994|en|994|WD=Q24114|lt=994 AD|1=994}}
|
* {{ill|1054|en|1054|WD=Q19369|lt=1054 AD|1=1054}}
* {{ill|1114|en|1114|WD=Q19533|lt=1114 AD|1=1114}}
* {{ill|1174|en|1174|WD=Q19690|lt=1174 AD|1=1174}}
* {{ill|1234|en|1234|WD=Q5424|lt=1234 AD|1=1234}}
* {{ill|1294|en|1294|WD=Q5559|lt=1294 AD|1=1294}}
* {{ill|1354|en|1354|WD=Q6118|lt=1354 AD|1=1354}}
* {{ill|1414|en|1414|WD=Q6179|lt=1414 AD|1=1414}}
* {{ill|1474|en|1474|WD=Q6600|lt=1474 AD|1=1474}}
* {{ill|1534|en|1534|WD=Q6447|lt=1534 AD|1=1534}}
* {{ill|1594|en|1594|WD=Q6777|lt=1594 AD|1=1594}}
* {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654 AD|1=1654}}
* {{ill|1714|en|1714|WD=Q6878|lt=1714 AD|1=1714}}
* {{ill|1774|en|1774|WD=Q7697|lt=1774 AD|1=1774}}
* {{ill|1834|en|1834|WD=Q7591|lt=1834 AD|1=1834}}
* {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894 AD|1=1894}}
* {{ill|1954|en|1954|WD=Q18581|lt=1954 AD|1=1954}}
|
* {{ill|2014|en|2014|WD=Q1999|lt=2014 AD|1=2014}}
* {{ill|2074 AD|ja|2074年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2074|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2074 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2070年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2134 AD|ja|2134年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2134|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2134 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2194 AD|ja|2194年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2194|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2194 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2254 AD|ja|2254年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2254|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2254 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2314 AD|ja|2314年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2314|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2314 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24世紀|1=24th century|WD=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2374 AD|ja|2374年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2374|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2374 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2434 AD|ja|2434年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2434|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2434 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2494 AD|ja|2494年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2494|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2494 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2554 AD|ja|2554年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2554|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2554 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2614 AD|ja|2614年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2614|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2614 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2674 AD|ja|2674年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2674|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2674 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2734 AD|ja|2734年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2734|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2734 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2794 AD|ja|2794年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2794|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2794 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2854 AD|ja|2854年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2854|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2854 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2914 AD|ja|2914年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2914|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2914 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2974 AD|ja|2974年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2974|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2974 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

=== Events ===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 27th Year (1894 AD) – The [[:en:Donghak Peasant Revolution|Kōgo Peasant War]] (also known as the Tōgakutō Rebellion) occurred.

==Months of Yang Wood Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May|1=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu|1=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Bó͘-chîn]]
[[zh-yue:戊戌]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Wood Horse|qq=ja|甲午|version=98658269|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Tsuch-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Erd-Hundvi]]
[[de:Yang Wood Horse]]

[[ja:甲午]]

[[zh:甲午]]
[[ko:갑오]]
[[fr:Cheval de bois]]
[[de:Holz-Pferd]]

[[af:Aardehond (astrologie)]]
[[de:Erde-Hundeen]]
[[en:Earth Dog]]
[[fr:Chien de terreboishak]]
[[it:Tsu-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:무술 (간지)]]
[[vi:Mậu Tuất]]
[[za:Mouzceij]]
[[zh:戊戌]]
[[ar:Yang Wood Horse]]

<!--Yang Wood Horse--><!--Yang Wood Horse-->


<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Houtperd (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gák-ngū]]
[[hak:Kap-ńg]]
[[nds:Holt-Peerd]]
[[vi:Giáp Ngọ]]
[[za:Gyapngux]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kap-ngó͘]]
[[zh-yue:甲午]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Houtperd (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gák-ngū]]
[[hak:Kap-ńg]]
[[nds:Holt-Peerd]]
[[vi:Giáp Ngọ]]
[[za:Gyapngux]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kap-ngó͘]]
[[zh-yue:甲午]]
{{wikidata link|Q904930}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
